label: Kota hostel room, raw late-night study reality
scene_goal: Create a believable first reference scene for recurring India student ads. The image must feel like real phone photography from a student's life, not AI concept art.

character_anchor.subject: 17-18 year old Indian boy, class 12 science student in Kota
character_anchor.expression: tired, stressed, trying to stay composed
character_anchor.pose: sitting at a cramped study desk or on the bed edge, holding a phone or looking at notebook

environment_anchor.location: small rented hostel room in Kota, Rajasthan
details: messy notebook pages with handwritten derivations

camera_anchor.quality: subtle low-light noise, realistic texture, no cinematic polish

lighting_anchor.look: mixed ugly practical lighting, believable hostel realism
